subject: [SO] Cleanup of SO charts
commit_message:
[SO] Cleanup of SO charts

Remove AAF and TLS related chart entries
Use OOM templates for deployment and service definitions
Remove so-appc-orchestrator, as it is not supported anymore

Issue-ID: OOM-3106

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: I6256aa0fbbe172752cc3d8f83edde0880de7f629

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

(6 comments)

Didn't go through full review but I see some stuff that may need the SO team to look at.
Cadi related stuff. msb also. Maybe appc can also be removed??
The overrides for each component look a bit like copy and paste so I would suggest the SO team need to look a bit closer at this clean up.
